briefdescription.para: This user trace menu function allows the user to select a trace in overlay sweeps mode which should be ignored.
Return a list of choices for the sweep selection popup.

detaileddescription.para: Includes a unique list of the DA stimsets of all available sweeps

memberdef.argsstring: (WaveText stimsets, WaveText setSweepCounts, WaveText dupsRemovedSetSweepCounts, WaveText dupsRemovedSetCycleCounts)
memberdef.name: OVS_RemoveLowCountEntries

briefdescription.para: Remove all stimsets which were only acquired once, disregaring RAC/SCI, this means we just look at all sweeps.
Return the datafolder reference to the folder storing the listbox and selection wave.

detaileddescription.para: Requires the user data PANEL_FOLDER of the BrowserSettings panel

simplesect.para: a valid DFREF or an invalid one in case the external panel could not be found

detaileddescription.para:
win
databrowser panel or graph
fullUpdate
[optional, defaults to false] Performs a full update instead of an incremental one. Selects the first sweep if nothing is selected as well.
Must be called after the sweeps changed.

briefdescription.para: Update the sweep selection choices for the popup menu.

detaileddescription.para: This function is expensive as it iterates over all sweeps.

briefdescription.para: Return the selected sweeps (either indizes or the real sweep numbers)

simplesect.para: invalid wave reference in case nothing is selected or numeric indizes/sweep numbers depending on mode parameter

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, variable newState, variable sweepNo=defaultValue, variable index=defaultValue, WaveOrNull sweeps=defaultValue, variable invertOthers=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: OVS_ChangeSweepSelectionState

briefdescription.para: Change the selection state of the the given sweep in the listbox wave.

detaileddescription.para: Triggers a update for the affected sweep.

win
panel
sweepNo
[optional] sweep number
sweeps
[optional] sweeps to change, can be $""
index
[optional] index into the listbox wave
newState
new checkbox state of the given sweeps
invertOthers
[optional, default to false] set the other sweeps to !newState if true
One of sweepNo/index is required.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, variable headstage, variable sweepNo=defaultValue, variable index=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: OVS_AddToIgnoreList

briefdescription.para: Add headstage to the ignore list of the given sweepNo/index
Update the OVS headstage removal wave from the listbox entry.

detaileddescription.para: The expected format of the list entries is a semicolon (";") separated list of subranges (without the possibility of denoting the step size).

Examples:
0 (ignore HS 0)
1,3;0 (ignore HS 0 to 3)
* (ignore all headstages)

simplesect.para: free wave of size NUM_HEADSTAGES denoting with 0/1 the active state of the headstage

briefdescription.para: Return the sweep number and experiment name for the given list index.
Change the selected sweep according to one of the popup menu options.
Incremental sweep plot updates for overlay sweeps.

detaileddescription.para: When modifying the listbox selection and contents wave this function can be called before doing so. After the modifications OVS_EndIncrementalUpdate() will take care of updating all sweeps which got changed.
The returned wave should be considered an opaque handle and not modified.

para.verbatim: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * WAVE updateHandle = OVS_BeginIncrementalUpdate(win) * * // modify list waves * // ... * * OVS_EndIncrementalUpdate(win, updateHandle) * *

detaileddescription.para: By setting fullUpdate to true a conventional full, that means non-incremental, update will be performed.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to true when OVS is off, false otherwise] allows to force a full update in OVS_EndIncrementalUpdate()

briefdescription.para: Perform the update of all changed sweeps.
